resources.title: Alcohol
resources.description: Guidance on alcohol reduction and cessation before surgery to improve outcomes and reduce complications.

resources.title: Anemia
resources.description: Pre-operative screening and management of anemia including iron deficiency to optimize surgical readiness.

resources.title: Cannabis
resources.description: Information on cannabis use and its impact on anesthesia, pain management, and surgical recovery.

resources.title: Cardiac
resources.description: Cardiac risk assessment and optimization strategies for patients undergoing non-cardiac surgery.

resources.title: Delirium
resources.description: Prevention and management of post-operative delirium including risk factors and evidence-based interventions.

resources.title: Frailty
resources.description: Assessment and optimization of frail patients to improve surgical tolerance and post-operative recovery.

resources.title: Glycemic Control
resources.description: Pre-operative blood glucose management and diabetic optimization strategies for surgical patients.

resources.title: Goals of Care
resources.description: Framework for discussing treatment goals, patient preferences, and shared decision-making before surgery.

resources.title: Illicit Substances
resources.description: Considerations for patients using illicit substances including perioperative risks and management strategies.

resources.title: Mental Wellbeing
resources.description: Psychological preparation for surgery including anxiety management and mental health optimization.

resources.title: Nutrition
resources.description: Evidence-based nutritional strategies including protein supplementation and micronutrient optimization.

resources.title: Obesity
resources.description: Perioperative considerations and optimization strategies for patients with obesity undergoing surgery.

resources.title: Obstructive Sleep Apnea
resources.description: Screening and management of obstructive sleep apnea to reduce perioperative respiratory complications.

resources.title: Pain Management
resources.description: Multimodal pain management strategies for pre-operative planning and post-operative recovery.

resources.title: Patient Activation
resources.description: Strategies to engage and empower patients in their own surgical preparation and recovery journey.

resources.title: Physical Activity
resources.description: Structured exercise guidelines to improve functional capacity before surgery including aerobic and resistance training.

resources.title: Smoking Cessation
resources.description: Smoking cessation programs with pharmacological and behavioral support for surgical candidates.

resources.title: Support After Surgery
resources.description: Post-operative support resources covering recovery expectations, follow-up care, and rehabilitation.
